request_payload.exposure_text: As a former intelligence analyst with 25 years of service, I've seen firsthand how our current security frameworks fall short. The recent attacks in [City] prove we need expanded domestic security powers. While some worry about civil liberties, we must balance these concerns with our duty to protect. Our allies are increasing their domestic security measures - shouldn't we do the same? The status quo isn't working. #NationalSecurityFirst #DutyBeforePolitics
